title: Military aircraft from Middle East at Prestwick Airport

sections.heading: What happened
sections.content: A special military aircraft from the Middle East turned heads at Prestwick Airport on Wednesday.

sections.heading: Key details
sections.content: The United Arab Emirates Air Force C-17A Globemaster passed by our photographer (Image: Charlie Gilmour) This article is brought to you by our exclusive subscriber partnership with our sister title USA Today, and has been written by our American colleagues. It does not necessarily reflect the view of The Herald.

sections.heading: Why it matters
sections.content: The United Arab Emirates Air Force C-17A Globemaster passed by our photographer Charlie Gilmour. The aircraft has been in service since 2012 and was painted in its special gold colour last year.

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – Special military aircraft from Middle East turns heads at Prestwick Airport
